word: H6628 - צֶאֶל - tseʼel - tseh'-el - Shady tree

sections.paragraph:
Original: צאל

Transliteration: tse'el

Phonetic: tseh'-el

BDB Definition:

  1. a kind of lotus
    1. a thorny lotus shrub

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be slender

TWOT entry: 1863

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
